ead.archdesc:
======= RMA00645Xth International Congress, History of Science, Ithaca-Philadelphia records14-17-645Compiled byDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
July 20032B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
physcThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:05:20 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Xth International Congress, History of Science, Ithaca-Philadelphia records
no primary creator
Smith, C. Hadley.
International Congress on the History of Sciences (10th ) (Location of meeting: Ithaca, N.Y. and Philadelphia, Penn.). Date of meeting or treaty signing: 1962 :.)
14-17-645
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
1962. Correspondence, bulletins, travel information. Correspondence and files relating to the Congress held at Ithaca. Collection material in English 3048917
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, July 2003
Cite As:
International Congress of the History of Science records, #14-17-645. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Correspondence and files relating to the Congress held at Ithaca.
Scope and content
Also photographs (with identifications) taken in the History of Science Collections and the Rare Book Department in Olin Library at Cornell University by C. Hadley Smith.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Photographs. Science -- Study and teaching

Scope and Contents
Also, 2 3x5" card file drawers, one containing a list of libraries, museums, colleges, etc. in the U.S. and Canada and the other, a list of domestic and foreign periodicalsTaton R.41Argentina - travel grants42Australia - travel grants43Austria - travel grants44Belgium - travel grants45Brazil - travel grants46Canada - travel grants47China - (Hong Kong)48Czechosolovakia - Per diem49Denmark - travel grants410France - travel grants411Germany - travel grants412Great Britain - travel grants413Holland - travel grants414Hungry - travel grants415India - Perdiem and travel grants416Iran - travel grants417Israel - travel grants418Italy - travel grants419Japan - travel grants420Malaya - travel grants421Mexico - travel grants422Peru - travel grants423Poland - Per diem424Portugal425Rumania - Delegates426Spain - travel grants427Sweden - travel grants428Switzerland - travel grants429Syria - travel grants430Tunisia - travel grants431Turkey - travel grants432U.S.S.R. - Per diem433Yugoslovia - Per diem434Symposia435Petty cash and Anne Marie #8047436Grants for Campus - Finance437Publicity for Congress438Special requests for grants439Symposium I - Ancient Science440Symposium II - Renaissance Sciences441Symposium III - Philosophy442Symposium IV - Physics443Symposium V - American Sciences444Thos.
